task_context: Node cn060 power draw spiked to 1100W (baseline: 350W) after loading a new software module 'tensorflow/2.15-gpu'. GPU utilization jumped to 100%. This is a shared node with 4 GPUs; job 1049300 requested 1 GPU.
task_question: Explain the energy anomaly on cn060.
agent_response: The energy anomaly on cn060 coincides with loading the tensorflow/2.15-gpu module and job 1049300 starting. The 1100W power draw with 100% GPU utilization suggests the TensorFlow workload is maxing out the GPU. However, the job requested only 1 GPU but the power draw seems excessive for a single GPU. This might indicate the job is using more GPUs than allocated, or the single GPU is a particularly power-hungry model running at full capacity.
